message:
perf(memdb): drain scratch buffer instead of cloning to avoid per-row Arc overhead, plus IN/EXISTS regression guards

connection.rs (B3.5 optimization):
- Replace mem_row_values.clone() with mem_row_values.drain(..).collect()
  in the prepared INSERT direct-upsert path. This avoids per-row Arc
  clones for Text/Blob SqliteValues by transferring ownership via drain,
  while preserving the Vec's capacity for the next row iteration.

in_exists_regression.rs (B7 regression guards):
- guard_large_in_subquery_completes_within_budget: 1000-row lookup
  table + 100-row data table, asserts HashSet-based IN probe returns
  correct count within 500ms budget (pre-fix linear scan would exceed
  10s)
- guard_correlated_exists_completes_within_budget: 500-row parent
  table with 10 children per even-numbered parent, asserts EXISTS
  with LIMIT 1 injection returns correct count within 2000ms budget

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- bd-wwqen.3: document B3.5 drain-instead-of-clone fix landing
- bd-wwqen.7: document B7 IN/EXISTS regression guards landing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
